lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਬਾਛੈ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਪਰੋਈ ॥੨॥੫॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: tin kee dhoor naanak daas baachhai jin har naam ridai paroee |2|5|33|
lines.english: Slave Nanak yearns for the dust of the feet of those, who have woven the Lord's Name into their hearts. ||2||5||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ਸੂਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke dookh nivaarai sookaa man saadhaarai |
lines.english: He dispels the pains of countless incarnations, and lends support to the dry and shrivelled mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਭੇਟਤ ਹੋਤ ਨਿਹਾਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: darasan bhettat hot nihaalaa har kaa naam beechaarai |1|
lines.english: Beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, one is enraptured, contemplating the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਵੈ ਕਾਟੈ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫੰਧਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam aaukhadh mukh devai kaattai jam kee fandhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He places the medicine of the Naam into my mouth, and cuts away the noose of Death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਬੈਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: meraa baid guroo govindaa |
lines.english: My physician is the Guru, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮਰਥ ਪੁਰਖ ਪੂਰਨ ਬਿਧਾਤੇ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: samarath purakh pooran bidhaate aape karanaihaaraa |
lines.english: He is the all-powerful, Perfect Lord, the Architect of Destiny; He Himself is the Doer of deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਉਬਾਰਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥੨॥੬॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: apunaa daas har aap ubaariaa naanak naam adhaaraa |2|6|34|
lines.english: The Lord Himself saves His slave; Nanak takes the Support of the Naam. ||2||6||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੇ ਲਾਖ ਖਤੇ ਕਰਿ ਫੇਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bakhas laihu saahib prabh apane laakh khate kar fero |1|
lines.english: Please forgive me, O Lord God Master; I have committed thousands of sins and mistakes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਜਾਨੀ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਪਾਹਿ ਨਿਬੇਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: antar kee gat tum hee jaanee tujh hee paeh nibero |
lines.english: Only You know the state of my innermost self; You alone can judge me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਮੋਹਿ ਚੇਰੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har charan saran mohi chero |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord, please bless Your disciple with the shelter of Your feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਤੂ ਮੇਰੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਨੇਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jee too mero tthaakur nero |
lines.english: O my Dear Lord God Master, You are always near me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟਿ ਸਿਲਕ ਕੀਨੋ ਅਪੁਨੋ ਦਾਸਰੋ ਤਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਹਾ ਨਿਹੋਰੋ ॥੨॥੭॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: kaatt silak keeno apuno daasaro tau naanak kahaa nihoro |2|7|35|
lines.english: Cutting away the noose of death, the Lord has made Nanak His slave, and now, what does he owe to anyone else? ||2||7||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਸੁਮਾਰ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਊਚੋ ਗੁਨੀ ਗਹੇਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: besumaar beant suaamee aoocho gunee gahero |
lines.english: Infinite and endless is my Lord and Master; He is lofty, virtuous and profoundly deep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਾ ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal guroo govindaa sagal manorath paae |
lines.english: The Guru, the Lord of the Universe, became merciful to me, and I obtained all of my mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਥਿਰ ਭਏ ਲਾਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: asathir bhe laag har charanee govind ke gun gaae |1|
lines.english: I have become stable and steady, touching the Lord's Feet, and singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲੋ ਸਮੂਰਤੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhalo samoorat pooraa |
lines.english: It is a good time, a perfectly auspicious time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਵਾਜੇ ਅਨਹਦ ਤੂਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saant sehaj aanand naam jap vaaje anahad tooraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am in celestial peace, tranquility and ecstasy, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the unstruck melody of the sound current vibrates and resounds. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਗਲੀ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਈ ॥੨॥੮॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: har naam nidhaan naanak jan paaeaa sagalee ichh pujaaee |2|8|36|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has attained the treasure of the Lord's Name; all his desires have been fulfilled. ||2||8||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਘਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: mile suaamee preetam apune ghar mandar sukhadaaee |
lines.english: Meeting with my Beloved Lord and Master, my home has become a mansion filled with happiness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਬਸੇ ਰਿਦ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਸੁਭ ਲਖਣ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan base rid bheetar subh lakhan prabh keene |
lines.english: The Guru's feet abide within my heart; God has blessed me with good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਖਵਾਰੋ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: mero gur rakhavaaro meet |
lines.english: My Guru is my Saving Grace, my only best friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਮਨਿ ਚੀਨੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal pooran paramesar naam nidhaan man cheene |1|
lines.english: The Perfect Transcendent Lord became merciful to me, and I found the treasure of the Naam within my mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਣ ਚਊਣੀ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸੋਭਾ ਨੀਤਾ ਨੀਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: doon chaoonee de vaddiaaee sobhaa neetaa neet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Over and over again, He blesses me with double, even four-fold, greatness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸਗਲ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant prabh sagal udhaare darasan dekhanahaare |
lines.english: God saves all beings and creatures, giving them the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਅਚਰਜ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੯॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee acharaj vaddiaaee naanak sad balihaare |2|9|37|
lines.english: Wondrous is the glorious greatness of the Perfect Guru; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||2||9||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਛਿ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਆਨੰਦ ਸੁਖ ਮਾਣਹੁ ਖਾਇ ਜੀਵਹੁ ਸਿਖ ਪਰਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bilachh binod aanand sukh maanahu khaae jeevahu sikh paravaar |1|
lines.english: Revel in it, delight in it, be happy and enjoy peace, and live long, O Sikhs and brethren. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਚਨਿ ਕਰਉ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਥਾਤੀ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sanchan krau naam dhan niramal thaatee agam apaar |
lines.english: I gather in and collect the immaculate wealth of the Naam; this commodity is inaccessible and incomparable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਆਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: har ke charan kamal aadhaar |
lines.english: I have the support of the Lotus Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਚ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਚੜਿ ਲੰਘਉ ਬਿਖੁ ਸੰਸਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad paaeo sach bohith charr langhau bikh sansaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, I have found the boat of Truth; embarking on it, I sail across the ocean of poison. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਆਪਹਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal pooran abinaasee aapeh keenee saar |
lines.english: The perfect, imperishable Lord has become merciful; He Himself has taken care of me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਗਸਾਨੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੁਮਾਰ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: pekh pekh naanak bigasaano naanak naahee sumaar |2|10|38|
lines.english: Beholding, beholding His Vision, Nanak has blossomed forth in ecstasy. O Nanak, He is beyond estimation. ||2||10||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਅਪਨੀ ਕਲ ਧਾਰੀ ਸਭ ਘਟ ਉਪਜੀ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai apanee kal dhaaree sabh ghatt upajee deaa |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has revealed His power, and compassion has welled up in every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਵਡਾਈ ਕੀਨੀ ਕੁਸਲ ਖੇਮ ਸਭ ਭਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape mel vaddaaee keenee kusal khem sabh bheaa |1|
lines.english: Blending me with Himself, He has blessed me with glorious greatness, and I have found pleasure and happiness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਮੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur pooraa merai naal |
lines.english: The Perfect True Guru is always with me.
